历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category in Ningxia were approximately 794th → 555th → 519th → 426th, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 368 places over the past 3 years, and a baseline ranking of approximately 426th in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Ningxia was 40 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 44 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 30, a reduction of about 32% compared to 2025, with a significant decrease in slots, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranks approximately 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, consistently in the Top 25 in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering institution; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students assaulted by outsiders, the university accused of favoritism), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 74th (average), with moderate short video exposure; no significant historical record of admission gaps; Fifth Round Discipline Evaluation A+: Materials Science and Engineering, Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology; A: Mechanical Engineering; A-: Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering. A total of 7 A- and above disciplines, with extremely strong strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended with high social attention; the total number of candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is approximately 66,000 (including uncertain marks), roughly flat compared to 2025's 44,491 Physics Category + 21,406 History Category; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the same Northwest region as Ningxia, with close geographical distance and similar culture, offering natural regional appeal to Ningxia candidates. Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the 32% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, the strong appeal of the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines, and the sustained high popularity of majors, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with the minimum admission ranking continuing to advance; however, the negative reputation and flat total number of candidates will somewhat buffer the extent of ranking advancement. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 360th, with a range of 306–414th.

For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<306), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
